project_type: Node.js Express monorepo with multiple standalone SaaS apps
build_system: npm per-app (each app has its own package.json)
test_command: npm test (per app directory, runs node --test tests/app.test.js)
verification_instructions: cd into each app directory, run npm install, then npm test. All tests should pass.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js v22 available. No external AI API keys available - use mock/simulated AI responses (following existing pattern in ai-content-generator).
contribution_requirements: Each app is fully self-contained with its own package.json, server.js, db/, routes/, views/, public/, tests/. Uses SQLite via better-sqlite3, EJS templating, bcrypt+express-session auth.
key_patterns: 1) server.js exports {app, db} and only starts listening when NODE_ENV !== 'test'. 2) DB uses better-sqlite3 with DB_PATH env var (':memory:' for tests). 3) Tests use Node.js built-in test runner with http module for requests. 4) Auth via express-session with bcrypt hashing. 5) Views use EJS with inline CSS classes. 6) Mock AI generation (no real API calls). 7) Each app runs on its own port.
directory_structure: Root has active-saas/ and passive-saas/ folders. New apps go in viral-ai-saas/ top-level folder. Each app has: server.js, package.json, db/ (database.js, schema.sql), routes/, views/, public/css/, public/js/, tests/app.test.js, README.md, .gitignore
